initial_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['transmute']
Prompt family: transmute
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Reconstruct the provided question into a complete, standalone instruction set for a downstream agent. You must include the full text of all input data, examples, or content provided in the original question within your 'message_for_next_agent' field so that the next agent has everything required to solve the problem without external references. Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B7-sarcasm-classification
Title: B7. Sarcasm Classification

Problem:
Classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1).
Determine the 3-bit pattern.

Grading target:
Exact match on the 3-bit string.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
